#+TITLE: Whitespace Edge Cases

* Trailing whitespace cases

Line with trailing spaces
Line with trailing tab
Line with mixed trailing whitespace
Line with no trailing whitespace

* Multiple consecutive blank lines



Three blank lines above (should collapse to one)




Five blank lines above (should collapse to one)

* Blank lines before headings

Text directly before heading
* Heading without blank line (should add one)

Text with too many blanks



* Heading with too many blank lines before it (should have exactly one)

* Consecutive headings (no blank line needed)
** Sub-heading
*** Sub-sub-heading

* Blank lines inside protected regions

#+BEGIN_SRC python
# These blank lines should be preserved



# Even multiple ones
#+END_SRC

#+BEGIN_EXAMPLE



Multiple blanks in example should stay.

#+END_EXAMPLE

* Trailing blank lines at end of file
